articles.description: Aston Villa boss Unai Emery says VAR made a "huge mistake" in not sending off Nottingham Forest's Elliot Anderson in their Europa League semi-final first leg.
articles.title: Unai Emery: Villa boss furious with VAR for not sending off Elliot Anderson

articles.description: Chris Wood has not missed a penalty in 10 years, but has barely played for six months. Now the striker is back - and aiming to lead Nottingham Forest to the Champions League.
articles.title: Nottingham Forest: Penalty king Chris Wood can first Forest to glory

articles.description: Star names including Jon Rahm and Bryson DeChambeau face an uncertain future on the LIV tour, writes Iain Carter.
articles.title: LIV Golf: What now for Jon Rahm, Bryson DeChambeau and biggest names?

articles.description: Being a club's record signing brings with it pressure, but Jorgen Strand Larsen puts a difficult start behind him with a goal that could be crucial in Crystal Palace's pursuit of a first major European trophy.
articles.title: Jorgen Strand Larsen: Norway striker steps up after difficult start at Crystal Palace

articles.description: Max Verstappen says the changes to F1's rules amount to "a tickle" in terms of addressing his and other drivers' concerns about the new style of racing.
articles.title: Miami Grand Prix: Max Verstappen says F1 rule changes 'a tickle' but Lando Norris believes drivers 'have to be happy'

articles.description: John Higgins produces a battling display to draw level at 4-4 against Shaun Murphy in the opening session of their World Championship semi-final.
articles.title: World Championship 2026: John Higgins battles back in semi-final with Shaun Murphy, Wu Yize leads Mark Allen

articles.description: World number one Luke Littler wins his fifth night of the Premier League Darts season to return to the top of the table.
articles.title: Premier League Darts 2026 results: Luke Littler beats Luke Humphries in Aberdeen to top standings

articles.description: Chris Sutton takes on Ella and Jake from BBC football drama Jamie Johnson FC plus the BBC readers and AI with his predictions for this weekend's fixtures.
articles.title: Premier League predictions: Chris Sutton v Ella and Jake from Jamie Johnson FC - & AI

articles.description: Former England and Manchester United striker Wayne Rooney believes the most difficult thing as a footballer is knowing you are no longer the player you were.
articles.title: Wayne Rooney: Knowing when no longer at best level is hardest thing

articles.description: A stronger and faster Sonny Baker is ready to put last summer's difficult white-ball debuts for England behind him.
articles.title: Sonny Baker: England bowler hoping for Test debut this summer
